items.title_en: Mayor of Paris removed parking spaces, "drastically" reduced the number of cars
items.title_zh: 巴黎市長取消停車位，大幅減少路上車輛
items.summary_en: Paris, under Mayor Anne Hidalgo, is reshaping streets by removing parking spaces to reclaim space for pedestrians and cyclists. Early indicators show a sharp drop in cars on targeted corridors, illustrating how road design can steer mobility and congestion. The move signals a testing ground for car-averse urban policy that other cities may watch closely.
items.summary_zh: 巴黎在安妮·伊达尔戈市长的推动下，通过移除停車位来重新规划街道，以让路给行人和自行车。初步数据表明部分路段的汽车数量显著下降，显示出路面设计对出行方式的强大引导作用。此举为其他城市提供了测试低车流出行的样本。

items.title_en: OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent
items.title_zh: OpenCode — 开源 AI 编码代理
items.summary_en: OpenCode is an open-source AI coding agent designed to orchestrate code generation, tooling, and runtimes. By releasing it as open source, it offers a transparent, customizable alternative to proprietary coding assistants and accelerates experimentation in AI-assisted development.
items.summary_zh: OpenCode 是一个开源的 AI 编码代理，旨在协调代码生成、工具集和运行时以完成编码任务。以开源形式发布，提供透明、可定制的替代方案，便于开发者在 AI 辅助的软件开发领域进行实验。

items.title_en: Why western carmakers' retreat from electric risks dooming them to irrelevance
items.title_zh: 西方车企撤出电动化恐致自我边缘化
items.summary_en: The Guardian piece argues that Western automakers' hesitation or retreat from electrification risks ceding leadership to aggressive EV players in China, Europe, and beyond. It highlights strategic missteps, overreliance on legacy engines, and geopolitical headwinds. For tech readers, the takeaway is that speed and focus on EVs are increasingly a competitive moat.
items.summary_zh: 这篇 Guardian 文章认为西方车企在电动化上的犹豫或撤退可能让它们在全球电动车竞赛中处于劣势，失去领导地位。文章指出在传统发动机的延续、策略失误以及地缘政治因素等方面的挑战。对科技读者而言，快速推进电动化成为日益关键的竞争壁垒。

items.title_en: Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record
items.title_zh: 阻断 Internet Archive 不会阻止 AI，但会抹去网络的历史记录
items.summary_en: EFF argues that blocking an online archive won't stop AI models from training on data, and could erase historical web records essential for research and accountability. The piece calls for smarter policy that protects memory and growth of AI capabilities without stifling innovation.
items.summary_zh: 电子前哨基金会指出，阻断互联网档案不会阻止AI使用数据，反而会抹去对研究和问责重要的网络历史记录。文章倡议在不扼杀创新的前提下，制定更聪明的政策以保护数字记忆与AI能力的长期发展。

items.title_en: Atuin v18.13 – better search, a PTY proxy, and AI for your shell
items.title_zh: Atuin v18.13：改进搜索、PTY 代理，并为你的 shell 增添 AI 能力
items.summary_en: Atuin v18.13 improves search, adds a PTY proxy, and introduces AI features for shell workflows, enhancing productivity and interoperability with terminal tools.
items.summary_zh: Atuin 最新版本 v18.13 增强了全局搜索、引入了一个 PTY 代理，并在 shell 工作流中加入 AI 功能，提升生产力与工具互操作性。

items.title_en: Our commitment to Windows quality
items.title_zh: 我们对 Windows 质量的承诺
items.summary_en: Microsoft details its approach to Windows quality, emphasizing reliability, performance, and user experience across updates and features. The post outlines rigorous testing, telemetry-informed validation, and feedback loops designed to reduce bugs and ship smoother experiences.
items.summary_zh: 微软阐述其 Windows 质量策略，聚焦更新中的可靠性、性能和用户体验。文中提到严格的测试、基于遥测的验证与反馈机制，旨在降低错误并交付更流畅的使用体验。

items.title_en: A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022)
items.title_zh: 日本筷子礼仪禁忌词汇表
items.summary_en: The glossary outlines common chopstick faux pas in Japan and explains polite usage. It helps foreigners avoid cultural missteps when dining, highlighting subtle etiquette differences.
items.summary_zh: 这份词汇表列出日本用餐时常见的筷子礼仪禁忌，并解释正确用法，帮助外国人避免尴尬的文化错误，凸显细微的礼仪差异。

items.title_en: France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app
items.title_zh: 法国航母被健身应用实时定位
items.summary_en: Real‑time activity data from a fitness app was used to pinpoint the location of a national aircraft carrier, exposing how public workout traces can reveal sensitive military movements. The incident highlights serious operational security and privacy risks from always‑on geolocation services and aggregated user data.
items.summary_zh: 来自某健身应用的实时活动数据被用来定位一艘国家航母，暴露出公开锻炼轨迹也能泄露敏感军事动态。该事件凸显了始终开启的地理定位服务与聚合用户数据带来的严峻运维安全和隐私风险。

items.title_en: Ghostling
items.title_zh: Ghostling（GitHub 开源项目）
items.summary_en: Ghostling appears to be an open-source project housed on GitHub.
items.summary_zh: Ghostling 看起来是一个托管在 GitHub 上的开源项目。

items.title_en: We rewrote our Rust WASM parser in TypeScript and it got faster
items.title_zh: 我们把 Rust 的 WASM 解析器改成 TypeScript，结果更快。
items.summary_en: After rewriting a Rust-based WASM parser in TypeScript, the TS version beat the original in benchmarks. The result highlights how modern TypeScript tooling and the JS/WASM execution environment can yield surprising performance for parsing workloads, raising interesting questions about language choice for cross-platform tooling.
items.summary_zh: 将基于 Rust 的 WASM 解析器改写为 TypeScript 后，在基准测试中反而更快。此结果凸显了现代 TypeScript 工具链与 JS/WASM 执行环境在解析任务上的潜在性能优势，并引发对跨平台工具选择的思考。

items.title_en: FFmpeg 101 (2024)
items.title_zh: FFmpeg 101（2024）
items.summary_en: A practical primer on FFmpeg as of 2024, covering essential commands, filters, and workflow patterns for modern multimedia tasks. It highlights how to craft efficient pipelines, handle subtitles and codecs, and stay up-to-date with ongoing tool developments.
items.summary_zh: 本文提供 FFmpeg 的实用入门要点，覆盖2024年的常用命令、滤镜及工作流程。帮助读者构建高效的多媒体处理管线，正确处理字幕与编解码，以及把握新特性的演进。

items.title_en: Astral to Join OpenAI
items.title_zh: Astral 将加入 OpenAI
items.summary_en: Astral will join OpenAI, signaling a consolidation of AI tooling and developer platforms. The move could accelerate integration of Astral's capabilities into OpenAI's ecosystem, influencing how developers build atop AI services.
items.summary_zh: Astral 将加入 OpenAI，标志着 AI 工具链和开发者平台的整合。这一举措可能加速将 Astral 的能力融入 OpenAI 的生态，影响开发者在 AI 服务上的搭建方式。

items.title_en: ArXiv declares independence from Cornell
items.title_zh: ArXiv宣布独立于康奈尔大学
items.summary_en: ArXiv, the long-running open-access preprint server, is shedding its longtime host by shifting governance away from Cornell. The move signals a push toward community-led stewardship and diversified funding as arXiv seeks long-term sustainability. For researchers, it could mean changes in governance, policy, and how quickly new features roll out.
items.summary_zh: 作为长期负责的开放获取预印本服务器，ArXiv 正在将治理从康奈尔大学转向独立管理。此次转变旨在实现更具社区驱动色彩的治理结构和多元化资金来源，以确保长期可持续性。对于研究者而言，未来在治理、政策和新功能上线速度等方面可能出现变化。

items.title_en: Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps
items.title_zh: 谷歌公布 24 小时内可 sideload 未验证 Android 应用的新流程
items.summary_en: Google detailed a 24-hour window that allows sideloading of unverified Android apps to accelerate testing and internal distribution outside the Play ecosystem. While it speeds iteration, it broadens the attack surface and prompts heightened security and policy safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌公布了一项 24 小时窗口，允许 sideload 未经验证的 Android 应用以加速测试和内部分发。此举虽提升迭代速度，但也扩大了潜在攻击面，需加强安全与策略层面的防护。

items.title_en: Super Micro Shares Plunge 25% After Co-Founder Charged in $2.5B Smuggling Plot
items.title_zh: Super Micro 股价暴跌25%：联合创始人因2.5亿美元走私案被起诉
items.summary_en: Super Micro's stock tumbled 25% after a co-founder was charged in a $2.5B AI-chip smuggling plot. The episode underscores how governance, legal risk, and geopolitical concerns can ripple through hardware supply chains and investor sentiment.
items.summary_zh: Super Micro 的股票在联合创始人被指控涉及25亿美元 AI 芯片走私案后暴跌25%。事件凸显治理、法律风险和地缘政治对硬件供应链与投资情绪的潜在冲击。

items.title_en: Linux Applications Programming by Example: The Fundamental APIs (2nd Edition)
items.title_zh: Linux 应用编程示例：基础 API（第2版）
items.summary_en: This second edition is an example-driven guide to Linux application programming, covering core APIs and practical routines. It updates foundational topics like POSIX interfaces, I/O, processes, signals, and threading with fresh examples for modern Linux.
items.summary_zh: 这本第二版以实例驱动的方式讲解 Linux 应用编程，聚焦核心 API 与实际用例。内容更新了 POSIX、I/O、进程、信号与线程等基础主题，并结合现代 Linux 场景给出新示例。

items.title_en: Delve – Fake Compliance as a Service
items.title_zh: Delve：假合规即服务
items.summary_en: Delve dives into the emerging 'Fake Compliance as a Service' phenomenon, critiquing services that generate pretend attestations or simplified controls to appease audits. The piece warns about integrity risks for users, regulators, and auditors when compliance is commodified.
items.summary_zh: Delve 深度剖析新兴的“假合规即服务”现象，批评那些提供虚假合规证明或简化控制的服务。文章警示当合规被商品化时，对用户、监管机构和审计方构成的信任与合规性风险。

items.title_en: Attention Residuals
items.title_zh: 注意力残差
items.summary_en: MoonshotAI’s Attention Residuals project combines residual connections with attention mechanisms to improve training stability and efficiency in Transformer models. The approach aims to reduce vanishing gradients and help models learn long-range dependencies with fewer training steps.
items.summary_zh: MoonshotAI 的 Attention Residuals 项目将残差连接与注意力机制结合，旨在提升 Transformer 模型的训练稳定性与效率。该方法有望降低梯度消失问题，帮助模型更高效地捕捉长距离依赖。

items.title_en: Just make it hard to fail
items.title_zh: 就让它真的难以失败
items.summary_en: A piece arguing for designing systems so failure is extremely hard to accomplish, emphasizing robust architecture, redundancy, and clear failure modes.
items.summary_zh: 文章倡导用稳健的架构、冗余和清晰的故障处理来让系统尽量不出错，挑战过于冒险的“快速迭代”思维。

items.title_en: Show HN: We built a terminal-only Bluesky / AT Proto client written in Fortran
items.title_zh: Show HN：用 Fortran 编写的仅终端 Bluesky/AT Proto 客户端
items.summary_en: A terminal-only Bluesky/ATProto client implemented in Fortran demonstrates minimalist tooling and portability, challenging assumptions that modern protocols demand modern stacks.
items.summary_zh: 展示了一个用 Fortran 实现、仅在终端运行的 Bluesky/ATProto 客户端，体现了极简工具链与可移植性的潜力，挑战了对现代协议必须使用现代栈的常识。

items.title_en: Entso-E final report on Iberian 2025 blackout
items.title_zh: Entso‑E 对 2025 年伊比利亚停电的最终报告
items.summary_en: The grid operator's final analysis reconstructs the sequence that led to the large Iberian blackout and identifies systemic vulnerabilities in control, coordination, and protection schemes. It recommends operational and infrastructure changes to improve cross‑border resilience as grids integrate more variable renewables.
items.summary_zh: 运营方的最终分析还原了导致大范围停电的故障链条，并指出控制、协调与保护机制上的系统性脆弱性。报告建议在运行和基础设施上采取改进措施，以在更多可变可再生能源接入时加强跨境电网的韧性。

items.title_en: Liberated Systemd
items.title_zh: Liberated Systemd
items.summary_en: A project aiming to liberate systemd by loosening its control or creating alternatives; discusses the motivations, potential benefits, and trade-offs of decoupling init systems.
items.summary_zh: 一个旨在解放或替代 Systemd 的项目，讨论去中心化、降低对单一初始化系统的依赖的动机、潜在收益及权衡。

items.title_en: Molly Guard
items.title_zh: Molly Guard（安全保护机制）
items.summary_en: Molly Guard discusses a safety mechanism intended to prevent accidental destructive actions in technical workflows.
items.summary_zh: Molly Guard 讨论了一种防止在技术工作流中发生误操作的安全机制。

items.title_en: Show HN: Sonar – A tiny CLI to see and kill whatever's running on localhost
items.title_zh: Show HN: Sonar — 一个查看并终止本地运行服务的小巧 CLI
items.summary_en: Sonar is a tiny command‑line utility that lists what's listening on localhost and lets you kill offending processes quickly, speeding up developer workflows when ports are occupied. It's a pragmatic, cross‑platform tool for reclaiming ports without digging through process managers or GUI tools.
items.summary_zh: Sonar 是一个小巧的命令行工具，可列出本地监听端口并快速终止占用进程，方便在端口被占用时加速开发流程。它以实用为主，跨平台地帮助开发者无需翻找复杂进程管理器即可回收端口。

items.title_en: The Social Smolnet
items.title_zh: 社交小网：Smolnet
items.summary_en: Smolnet advocates for tiny, well-governed social networks that emphasize privacy and humane moderation over scale. The piece surveys design choices, federation options, and governance tradeoffs that can yield healthier online ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: Smolnet 倡导小型、治理健全的社交网络，强调隐私保护和温和的社区治理胜过追求规模。文章梳理了设计选项、联盟协议和治理权衡，展示小型社区如何打造更健康的线上生态。

items.title_en: The Soul of a Pedicab Driver
items.title_zh: 黄包车司机的灵魂
items.summary_en: A reflective, often personal portrait of a pedicab driver that uses a single character to explore urban life, labor, and mobility. The narrative reveals how informal transport intersects with city economies, social dynamics, and the rhythms of daily streets.
items.summary_zh: 通过对一位黄包车司机的细致描写，文章从个人视角探讨了城市生活、劳动与交通的交织。叙述展示了非正规交通如何与城市经济、社会关系及日常街头节奏相互影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Red Grid Link – peer-to-peer team tracking over Bluetooth, no servers
items.title_zh: Show HN：Red Grid Link——基于蓝牙的点对点团队跟踪，无需服务器
items.summary_en: Red Grid Link offers peer-to-peer team tracking over Bluetooth with no servers, enabling offline collaboration and privacy-preserving coordination among teammates.
items.summary_zh: Red Grid Link 提供基于蓝牙的点对点团队跟踪，无需服务器，支持离线协作与隐私友好的团队协调。

items.title_en: NumKong: 2'000 Mixed Precision Kernels for All
items.title_zh: NumKong：2000 个混合精度内核，覆盖所有场景
items.summary_en: NumKong provides 2,000 mixed-precision kernels spanning matrix ops, activations, and utilities to speed up AI workloads on diverse hardware. The project highlights ongoing efforts to bridge high performance and accessibility in ML deployment.
items.summary_zh: NumKong 提供 2,000 个混合精度内核，覆盖矩阵运算、激活函数等，旨在提升多种硬件上的 AI 工作负载性能。该项目体现了通过定制化内核在高性能与易用性之间的权衡与努力。

items.title_en: Gangs of Karachi
items.title_zh: 卡拉奇帮派
items.summary_en: Harper's piece on the gangs in Karachi, exploring their rise, networks, and impact on urban life and security.
items.summary_zh: Harper's 杂志文章深入探讨卡拉奇的帮派及其网络结构、发展及对城市安全和日常生活的影响。

items.title_en: Reboot: Rebuild civilization by reinventing lost technologies
items.title_zh: 重启：通过重新发明失传技术来重建文明
items.summary_en: An essay on rebooting civilization by reinventing lost technologies, outlining approaches to recover critical capabilities and the societal shifts needed to sustain progress.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨通过重现失传技术来重建文明的可能路径，提出如何恢复关键能力、以及实现可持续进步所需的社会变革。

items.title_en: The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild
items.title_zh: 洛杉矶引水渠真是惊人
items.summary_en: The Los Angeles Aqueduct is portrayed as an engineering marvel with complex history and massive environmental consequences, from long gravity‑fed pipelines to major landscape alteration. The piece balances admiration for the engineering with scrutiny of the social and ecological costs of diverting water at scale.
items.summary_zh: 文中将洛杉矶引水渠描述为一项既惊人又复杂的工程奇迹，涉及长距离重力输水和对地貌的大规模改造。文章在赞叹工程成就的同时，也审视了大规模调水对社会与生态造成的代价。

items.title_en: Meme Buildings
items.title_zh: 梗图建筑
items.summary_en: An exploration of meme-culture-inspired architecture, examining how online memes influence design rhetoric, aesthetics, and urban spaces.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨梗图文化如何影响建筑设计的语言、美学与城市空间的表达，展示 meme 如何转化为设计灵感。

items.title_en: The worst volume control UI in the world (2017)
items.title_zh: 史上最差音量控制 UI（2017）
items.summary_en: The piece analyzes a famously poor volume control design, likely where volume changes unpredictably or the control isn't accessible. It discusses lessons for UX, such as clear affordances and intuitive feedback.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章评析了2017年广为人知的极差音量控制界面，指出其难以使用的原因与用户痛点。通过这枚案例，作者提出 UX 设计的教训，如直观的控制、清晰的反馈和一致性。

items.title_en: Mamba-3
items.title_zh: Mamba-3
items.summary_en: Mamba-3 appears to be a new release in the Mamba project, likely bringing improvements over prior versions.
items.summary_zh: Mamba-3 似乎是 Mamba 项目的新版本，可能在前一版本基础上带来改进。

items.title_en: Fujifilm X RAW STUDIO webapp clone
items.title_zh: 富士 X RAW STUDIO 的网页应用克隆
items.summary_en: An open-source clone of Fujifilm's X RAW STUDIO web app, enabling remote RAW editing workflows and color management. The project demonstrates community-driven reimplementation and potential open alternatives to vendor tools.
items.summary_zh: 一个对富士 X RAW STUDIO 网页应用的开源克隆，提供远程 RAW 编辑和色彩管理的工作流程。该项目展示了社区驱动的再实现能力，以及对厂商工具的开源替代的潜力。

items.title_en: VisiCalc Reconstructed
items.title_zh: VisiCalc 重建版
items.summary_en: Researchers recreate VisiCalc's original spreadsheet engine, detailing how its simple cell model and formula language powered the first killer app. The reconstruction exposes the architectural constraints that shaped early user expectations and informs how modern spreadsheets handle dependency tracking, recalculation, and UI latency.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员重建了 Visicalc 的原始电子表格引擎，揭示其简单的单元格模型和公式语言如何驱动首个爆款应用。重建过程暴露了早期架构的限制，并为现代电子表格在依赖跟踪、重算和界面延迟方面的设计提供了启示。

items.title_en: Drawvg Filter for FFmpeg
items.title_zh: FFmpeg 的 Drawvg 滤镜
items.summary_en: A new FFmpeg filter renders vector graphics directly into video frames, enabling crisp overlays and animated SVG‑style content in encoding pipelines. This makes it easier to integrate resolution‑independent artwork into video workflows without external rendering steps.
items.summary_zh: 一个新的 FFmpeg 滤镜能将矢量图直接渲染入视频帧，方便在编码流程中加入清晰的叠层和 SVG 式动画内容。这样可以在无需外部渲染的情况下，将分辨率无关的设计元素整合进视频工作流。

items.title_en: Parallel Perl – Autoparallelizing interpreter with JIT
items.title_zh: Parallel Perl：带 JIT 的自动并行化解释器
items.summary_en: Parallel Perl introduces an autoparallelizing Perl interpreter with JIT, aiming to automatically exploit multicore CPUs without changing source code. It discusses the technique, potential performance gains, and the challenges of dynamic languages where data dependencies are not explicit.
items.summary_zh: Parallel Perl 提供一个具备自动并行化能力的 Perl 解释器，结合 JIT 尝试在不修改代码的前提下自动利用多核。文章探讨了实现思路、潜在性能收益以及动态语言在依赖关系未显式表达时面临的挑战。

items.title_en: Too Much Color
items.title_zh: 太多颜色
items.summary_en: The author warns that oversized color palettes in design systems create cognitive load, inconsistencies, and accessibility pitfalls, advocating for fewer semantic tokens and stronger contrast rules. Simplifying color usage helps teams move faster and produce more coherent, accessible interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 作者提醒，设计系统中过多的颜色会增加认知负担、导致风格不一致并带来可访问性问题，主张采用更少的语义化色彩令牌和更严格的对比规范。简化色彩使用能让团队更高效并产出更统一、易用的界面。

items.title_en: The Ugliest Airplane: An Appreciation
items.title_zh: 最丑飞机：一段鉴赏
items.summary_en: The piece spotlights an aircraft commonly deemed aesthetically unappealing yet notable for its engineering or historical significance, illustrating how design quirks can reflect different priorities.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章聚焦于一架广为被认为外观丑陋的飞机，强调其在工程或历史上的独特价值，并展示设计风格与功能取向之间的权衡。

items.title_en: An industrial piping contractor on Claude Code [video]
items.title_zh: 一名管道承包商谈 Claude Code（视频）
items.summary_en: A piping contractor discusses Claude Code in a video, sharing real-world impressions of Claude's coding capabilities and limitations in industrial contexts.
items.summary_zh: 一名管道承包商在视频中聊到 Claude Code，分享在工业场景中对 Claude 的编码能力与局限性的真实观察。

items.title_en: Lent and Lisp
items.title_zh: 斋期与 Lisp
items.summary_en: A reflective pairing of Lent with Lisp, examining how constraints and discipline shape programming taste and a language's expressiveness.
items.summary_zh: 从约束与专注的角度，探讨斋期与 Lisp 的关系，以及它们如何塑造编程审美与语言表达力。

items.title_en: Cryptography in Home Entertainment (2004)
items.title_zh: 家庭娱乐中的密码学（2004）
items.summary_en: A historical look at cryptography in consumer entertainment devices around 2004, examining DRM, copy protection, and the evolving tension between security and usability.
items.summary_zh: 回顾2004年左右家庭娱乐设备中的密码学应用，聚焦数字版权管理、拷贝保护及安全性与易用性之间的博弈。

items.title_en: Padel Chess – tactical simulator for padel
items.title_zh: 帕德尔棋：帕德尔球战术模拟器
items.summary_en: Padel Chess offers a tactical simulator for padel players, helping analyze positions and practice strategy beyond traditional drills. It combines board-game-like reasoning with real-time sport movement insights.
items.summary_zh: Padel Chess 为帕德尔球爱好者提供战术模拟器，帮助分析局势、练习策略，超越简单的训练。它将棋盘式推演与实际运动要点结合，提升比赛准备。

items.title_en: Turing Award Honors Bennett and Brassard for Quantum Information Science
items.title_zh: 图灵奖表彰 Bennett 与 Brassard 在量子信息科学领域的贡献
items.summary_en: The ACM Turing Award honors Bennett and Brassard for foundational work in quantum information science, notably quantum cryptography and communication protocols like BB84. The recognition underscores how theoretical breakthroughs translate into practical cybersecurity and computing technology.
items.summary_zh: 这项由 ACM 授予的图灵奖表彰 Bennett 和 Brassard 在量子信息科学领域的奠基性工作，尤其是量子密码学与 BB84 等通信协议。此荣誉凸显理论突破向实际网络安全与计算技术的转化。

items.title_en: Heisuke Hironaka Has Died
items.title_zh: 著名数学家弘中英機去世
items.summary_en: Heisuke Hironaka, renowned for work on resolution of singularities and a Fields Medalist, has died, marking a significant loss in algebraic geometry. His contributions shaped modern theory and computational methods.
items.summary_zh: 著名数学家弘中英機因在代数几何中的奇点消解理论作出奠基性贡献而知名，曾获菲尔兹奖。其工作深刻影响了现代代数几何及相关计算方法。

items.title_en: Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages
items.title_zh: Meta 的 Omnilingual MT 支持1600种语言的机器翻译
items.summary_en: Meta unveils Omnilingual MT, a multilingual machine translation model designed to handle 1,600 languages in a single system. By pooling data across languages, it aims to improve coverage for underrepresented tongues and reduce translation gaps, though performance may vary by language. The deployment could reshape access to information for many communities.
items.summary_zh: Meta 公开 Omnilingual MT，一套面向1600种语言的通用翻译模型。通过跨语言数据整合提升对小语种的覆盖，尽管不同语言的翻译质量差异可能较大，但长期有望扩大信息获取的平等性。实际应用前景需关注数据规模与偏见等挑战。

items.title_en: The Story of Marina Abramovic and Ulay (2020)
items.title_zh: 玛丽娜·阿布拉莫维奇与乌莱的故事（2020）
items.summary_en: A 2020 retrospective on the iconic performance art duo Marina Abramović and Ulay, tracing their collaborative experiments, breakups, and lasting impact on performance art.
items.summary_zh: 2020年对标志性行为艺术二人组玛丽娜·阿布拉莫维奇与乌莱的回顾，梳理他们共同实验、分道扬镳，以及对后世行为艺术的深远影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: I fixed FFmpeg's subtitle conversion (the bug from 2014)
items.title_zh: Show HN：我修复了 FFmpeg 的字幕转换问题（2014年的漏洞）
items.summary_en: A developer claims to have fixed a long-standing FFmpeg subtitle conversion bug dating back to 2014, improving reliability and accuracy of subtitle handling. The post outlines the root cause, the patch, and how it affects current workflows.
items.summary_zh: 一位开发者宣布修复了 FFmpeg 长达十年的字幕转换 bug（源自2014年），提升字幕处理的稳定性与准确性。帖子解释了问题根源、补丁细节以及对现有工作流的影响。

items.title_en: How HN: Ironkernel – Python expressions, Rust parallel
items.title_zh: Ironkernel：Python 表达式、Rust 并行
items.summary_en: Ironkernel is a project combining Python-style expressions with Rust-backed parallel execution to speed up evaluation tasks. It explores language design and performance trade-offs between dynamic expression evaluation and compiled performance.
items.summary_zh: Ironkernel 项目将 Python 风格的表达式与 Rust 的并行执行结合，提升表达式计算的性能。它讨论了动态表达式语言与编译型性能之间的权衡以及实现细节。
